name: codex-control-plane-hooks
description: Best-effort local Hook checks for risky commands, selected credential patterns, sensitive-data handling, and Agent lifecycle state.

interface.shortDescription: Local policy checks for selected Codex Hook events
interface.longDescription: A version-scoped reference plugin that applies best-effort checks to observed Codex Hook events, tracks one-shot approvals, and records Agent lifecycle state.
defaultPrompt: Review the active Hook policy and explain what it will block.
Run the plugin's protocol tests and report the evidence boundary.
